name: Charlie Crist
subject: It is just fundamentally wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Are we a Florida for all? Or just a Florida for some?
|
---

| | Friend,

I spent the last week on a Voting Rights Tour talking to people across the state about the barriers to voting that they face. It couldn't be clearer that what we're seeing out of Tallahassee is horrific.

Earlier this spring, Ron DeSantis signed SB 90, an un-American bill that **restricts voting rights** (much like the one recently passed in Georgia). This bill makes it **_harder_** for Floridians to vote by mail, **_limits_** drop boxes, and **_criminalizes_** offering food and water to people waiting in line to vote.

In Tampa this week, I met with community leaders and shared my opinion: DeSantis and his allies are putting up roadblocks to democracy. The bill affects seniors, people with disabilities, and others. It is just fundamentally wrong.

DeSantis also barred **_every press outlet but Fox News_** from covering the signing ceremony in May. I'm not going to say Ron is afraid of the free press... but he's afraid of the free press.

**[With all my heart, I condemn this bill and DeSantis' attempts to suppress voting and muzzle the Fourth Estate. Will you join me?](https://act.myngp.com/el/xE9uqyOCPROfS8Jq_4bHIw==/Eaz7JH4g5dc0C8Z2A4IDEw==)**

We can see Ron for who he truly is: a corrupt politician so consumed with toeing the party line and protecting his own political future that he's willing to engage in voter suppression -- even against his party! **_Because, yes, this bill will make it more difficult for Republicans to vote as well._**

That's not the kind of governor I'll be.
* I'll make it easier to vote, just like I did before. Four months after I was sworn in as the 44th governor of Florida, I signed a law that **_expanded_** voting access for eligible citizens. I made it easier to vote by mail and extended early voting hours to deal with long lines.
* And I won't lock out the press and cater to partisan news channels. Everyone will be invited in: Democrats, Republicans, and Independents.

**Voter suppression undermines the very notion that Florida is the land of opportunity -- and the local leaders I met in Gainesville, Miami, and across the state agree. Times like these force us to ask ourselves: Are we a Florida for all? Or just a Florida for _some_? Which do we want to be?**

**[You know where Ron stands on this issue. You know where I stand. If you're with me, add your name to condemn DeSantis' voter suppression bill and attacks on the free press.](https://act.myngp.com/el/xE9uqyOCPROfS8Jq_4bHIw==/Eaz7JH4g5dc0C8Z2A4IDEw==)**

\-- Charlie Crist

| [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/xE9uqyOCPROfS8Jq_4bHIw==/38DXbwj5qK2iR8oprXwx_Q==?20210613_p_1_fl&amount=25)
---

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---

P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

Which do we want to be? == \-- Charlie Crist | | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States ==

| | | **Democrats brace for 2022 elections with 'little margin for error'**

_-Los Angeles Times_
---
Peter, did you see the headline from the LA Times?

We need your help if we want to keep the House majority in 2022. With Democrats holding a razor-thin majority, holding every seat matters.

That includes Abigail, who is **one of Republicans ' top targets**. VA-07 will be one of the most competitive races in the country, and we need all-hands-on-deck to keep Abigail fighting for us in Congress.

[_**Will you contribute now to support Abigail in this crucial race? Holding the House could come down to holding this seat!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/gZlM5UCkgboaMgW_Fq8qi37OYUigZDKl9LYHO96qWUw=/gTaKDzPQtrmfPzFy2BNoB6OXHgVXaEJq0u7cAObsKnE=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210613-1-EM&amount=25)

clean_body: We need to make President Trump’s birthday his best ever, Peter. | Peter, And what President Trump wants most for his birthday this year is to Stop Joe Biden and elect Republicans in battleground races. We’ve set an ambitious goal of making tomorrow his BIGGEST FUNDRAISING DAY EVER , and we’re going to be giving him a list of every Grassroots Republican who stepped up to help him on his birthday. Will your name be on it, Peter? | | | | | | The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to undermine President Trump’s legacy and stop our America First Agenda. But with Grassroots Republicans like you on our side, there’s nothing they can do to stop our movement. | Thank you. Donald J. Trump Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Here's what I saw on file next to your name, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
In preparation for our *huge* Q2 fundraising deadline, I was looking through our donation records and saw your name.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210613-1739-header&t=1&akid=1739%2E434096%2EW_zbv1)
I realize it's the weekend, Peter, so I promise I'll keep this super quick.
In preparation for our *huge* Q2 fundraising deadline coming up at the end of this month, I was looking through our donation records when I saw your name.
Here's what I pulled from the records we've got on file: 👇
**_Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20209?refcode=em20210613-1739&t=2&akid=1739%2E434096%2EW_zbv1)**
---
The reason I'm showing you this today is because, at the very end of this month, John is required by federal law to publicly report exactly how much we've raised to the FEC.
**All eyes will be on our campaign — especially now because of the latest poll that dropped that shows John is the *only* Democrat in this race who can reliably win in every Republican matchup.**
We're going to need every penny of support we can get ahead of this Q2 deadline in order to fend off GOP attacks and elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate. So I've gotta ask:
[**Will you donate your very first $5 right now? John isn't accepting a cent of corporate PAC money in this campaign — this is a truly grassroots campaign — so even a small donation helps if you can swing it today.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20209?refcode=em20210613-1739&t=3&akid=1739%2E434096%2EW_zbv1)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20209?refcode=em20210613-1739&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1739%2E434096%2EW_zbv1)**
Thanks for hearing me out, and enjoy your Sunday! 😎
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210613-1739-footer&t=23&refcode2=1739_434096_W_zbv1&akid=1739%2E434096%2EW_zbv1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=1739%2E434096%2EW_zbv1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1739%2E434096%2EW_zbv1)

Here's what I pulled from the records we've got on file: 👇 Peter's Official Team Fetterman Record Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2021 Donor: No — not yet! 2021 Total: $0.00 Suggested Donation: $5 The reason I'm showing you this today is because, at the very end of this month, John is required by federal law to publicly report exactly how much we've raised to the FEC. All eyes will be on our campaign — especially now because of the latest poll that dropped that shows John is the only Democrat in this race who can reliably win in every Republican matchup. We're going to need every penny of support we can get ahead of this Q2 deadline in order to fend off GOP attacks and elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate. So I've gotta ask: Thanks for hearing me out, and enjoy your Sunday! 😎 Eric Eric Stern Deputy Campaign Manager John Fetterman for U.S. Senate | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Team Bass
subject: Darryn reached out yesterday.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
If you missed Darryn's note yesterday, here are three major takeaways:

> 1\. In every midterm election for the last 70 years, the presidential party has lost an average of **27 House seats**.
> 2\. The GOP only has to flip five seats to win control of the House. And with gerrymandering, voter suppression, and outright corruption in their arsenal -- the deck is stacked against us.
> 3\. Karen's no stranger to beating the odds. She's determined to defend vulnerable Democrats so we can keep fighting for progress in the House.
**Listen, Karen 's counting on our team raising $1,170 from this email to stay on track to hit our $3,000 mid-month goal. [Will you chip in $5 -- or whatever you can -- to help us get there?](https://act.myngp.com/el/n9iZhhYED3j1MsvhgPteVzcYKdmCNN0w0hDMTTc3sAo=/Rj0zsVQjv2sILIAqeD-ljwnip3cN6SHPgwDI4I6fJIs=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210613_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_tb_kkr_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210613_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_tb_kkr_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Let's do this,

Team Bass

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Darryn Harris, Team Bass** <info@karenbass.com>
Date: Sat, Jun 12, 2021
Subject: If you read one single email today, let it be this one
**[Hey friend -- we're only 18 days away from our FEC end-of-quarter deadline, so I'm asking you to chip in $5, $15, or whatever you can to help Karen hit our $3,000 mid-month fundraising goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/n9iZhhYED3j1MsvhgPteVzcYKdmCNN0w0hDMTTc3sAo=/Rj0zsVQjv2sILIAqeD-ljwnip3cN6SHPgwDI4I6fJIs=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210613_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_tb_kkr_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210613_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_tb_kkr_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

I know these fundraising emails are tedious, but hitting our goals is how our campaign stays on track. Every dollar we raise goes toward Karen defending the House majority, and right now, every single cent is crucial.

**We 're starting the race to the midterm elections at a huge disadvantage.** For the last 70 years, the presidential party has lost an average of **27 House seats** in midterm elections. If that weren't bad enough, Republicans only have to flip five seats to take control of the House majority. We can't let that happen.

If we want to keep pushing for policing reform, environmental justice, voter protections, and a democracy that works for the people, we have to defend every single seat. Karen is shoring up the resources we'll need to send support to vulnerable Democrats, and she is counting on grassroots support.

**Team, I know we can beat the odds and defend the House. But it starts with staying on track for our upcoming FEC deadline.[Can we count on you to donate to help us hit $3,000 by midnight Tuesday?](https://act.myngp.com/el/n9iZhhYED3j1MsvhgPteVzcYKdmCNN0w0hDMTTc3sAo=/Rj0zsVQjv2sILIAqeD-ljwnip3cN6SHPgwDI4I6fJIs=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210613_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_tb_kkr_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210613_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_tb_kkr_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/n9iZhhYED3j1MsvhgPteVzcYKdmCNN0w0hDMTTc3sAo=/Rj0zsVQjv2sILIAqeD-ljwnip3cN6SHPgwDI4I6fJIs=?gpsid=39_132_19358&refcode=em21_210613_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_tb_kkr_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210613_mm1_fnd_gq_act_prpl_tb_kkr_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&express_lane=true&amount=5)

Darryn Harris

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: The Hill just named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. We need your help this weekend to defend this seat!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
We’re reaching out because our June FEC fundraising deadline is coming up at the end of the month. We’ve set our BIGGEST goal of the year so far and we need your help to close the gap on it in the next few days.
So we’re launching a 72-hour effort to get 10,000 contributions by Tuesday to help us stay on track to hit our 100,000 contribution FEC goal.
Hitting this goal is so important for two reasons. One, because two new Republican candidates just announced they are running against Mark in 2022 — that’s three opponents total. And two, because The Hill just named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
This puts a big spotlight on us and means we have to hit these fundraising targets if we want to defend Mark and hold this seat next year.
**You can see how critical it is that we have your support, friend. So here’s the part where we ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? Every donation we receive in the next 72-hours will be put right to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?amount=3?refcode=em210613-1-15&t=1&refcode2=779_6688874_pbd3LA&akid=779%2E6688874%2Epbd3LA)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210613-1-15&t=2&refcode2=779_6688874_pbd3LA&akid=779%2E6688874%2Epbd3LA)**
Thank you for all of your help towards hitting this goal. Together, we can reach this goal which will set us up for success at the end of the month.
We can’t thank you enough for your continued support, it means so much to Mark and all of us on Team Kelly.
Full speed ahead!
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210613-1-15&t=3&refcode2=779_6688874_pbd3LA&akid=779%2E6688874%2Epbd3LA)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=779%2E6688874%2Epbd3LA).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Team Padilla
subject: 3 Things
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends — we have three very important pieces of information to
share with you.

1. Senate Republicans are blocking our ability to pass the For the People
Act — a critical piece of voting rights legislation.

2. To make things worse, Senate Republicans are also using the filibuster
to block our efforts at every turn.

3. But we aren’t giving up! Our goal in June is to get 10,000 online
donations to help fuel our efforts to keep Alex in the Senate and protect
the right to vote.

This deadline is critical and luckily we still have some time to dig deep
and knock this goal out of the park.

Let’s make today one of our best so far! Are you with us?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21/?refcode=em210613-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=82_159979_49AFNf&akid=82%2E159979%2E49AFNf ]Will you make a $3 contribution to our grassroots
campaign? We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every
donation we receive in June sends a powerful message that we will not back
down without a fight.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210613-1-15&t=1014&refcode2=82_159979_49AFNf&akid=82%2E159979%2E49AFNf ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jun21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210613-1-15&t=1015&refcode2=82_159979_49AFNf&akid=82%2E159979%2E49AFNf ]Donate $25

name: Voting Rights -- via Navarre HQ
subject: Protecting the right to vote

Peter,
Stewart is running to restore Americans' faith in our democracy. This shouldn’t be a partisan issue, but sadly, it’s become one. That’s why Congress must pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act to protect the right to vote!
This critical bill restores and strengthens key provisions of the Voting Rights Act of 1965. It’s a simple issue but one that absolutely must be passed by both parties.
Let Congress know their inaction is at-odds with a healthy democracy. **[Add your name to this petition by midnight to say you support the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30747845/290497881/25281656?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc4NGExNi05MGNjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HxORXDEEMrZxMUDgQ5d15EMgpxmD1cq0SGxhf0rbyrg=&emci=7f196911-30cb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ca784a16-90cc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7152412)**

Hi there — Rebecca here, with Team Heinrich. Martin has been hard at work fighting for policies that will make life better for New Mexico’s workers and families. That’s his number one job and what he’s focused on. My job is to make sure he can keep that focus. So here’s where I need your help. We have to stay on track to meet our quarterly fundraising goal. And we’re still short. Meeting our quarterly goals is important because it ensures we have the resources to keep our campaign running on all cylinders — from getting out the vote for important local elections, to supporting our county parties, to helping elect strong Democrats like Melanie Stansbury (how excited are we about her landslide win?!?!). **Even still, I just looked at the numbers and our fundraising is not where it needs to be for the quarter to keep the pace up on our work. Peter,
Each year, Senator Patty Murray hosts the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards to celebrate local heroes who have stepped up, given back, and made a difference in their communities.
Our 2020 winners included Rachel Duboff from Seattle who founded Neighbors Feeding Neighbors to help families put food on the table in the pandemic, Dr. Mabel Bodell who helped the Latino community in Washington state with COVID-19 resources and information, and Alise Morrissey, a family reunification advocate who helps parents overcome challenges like substance abuse and the navigating court systems. name: Matthew Miller
subject: a personal story about my fiancé Malcolm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hi friend,
In honor of Pride Month, I want to share a personal story with you about my fiancé Malcolm.
It's a little long, but it's important that you know where the heart of our campaign is.
[And after you're done reading, I hope you'll consider making a contribution to help Malcolm make history as the first out gay man and the first openly LGBTQ person of color in the U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30750574/290505709/-347207331?refcode2=9e3010c5-9ecc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210613-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTMwMTBjNS05ZWNjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iozjNtgvzf1NKQQ1zXNs9VrsUMTYaYRFrRQCSTWy9GM=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30750575/290505710/-347207331?refcode2=9e3010c5-9ecc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&noskip=true&refcode=em210613-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTMwMTBjNS05ZWNjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iozjNtgvzf1NKQQ1zXNs9VrsUMTYaYRFrRQCSTWy9GM=)
People often ask what brought me from the sunny shores of California all the way to the rolling hills of Pennsylvania and the great city of Philadelphia.
My answer, first of all, is a job. My second answer is love — being with Malcolm.
I fell in love with Malcolm because I discovered that he was someone who not only works hard for his community but loves hard on them as well.
Whether he's leading block clean-ups or traveling thousands of miles across the Commonwealth, listening to folks talk about their needs and their dreams, he shows his community love in public every day.
**Actions like these show us where love and democracy overlap — they show us that democracy is a public practice of love.**
As a working person, as a Black millennial, as a gay person, I see Malcolm as a prism of the love and light our country needs. And that I need.
So as his fiancé, I'm so proud to stand with Malcolm as we fight for love and a democracy that works for working people like us.
And I'm grateful to have you be a part of our fight. This campaign is powered by working people, unapologetically for working people.
[So before you go, I have to ask: If you're able to pitch in today, could you make a contribution to own a piece of the historic campaign we're building together?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30750576/290505711/-347207331?refcode2=9e3010c5-9ecc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210613-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTMwMTBjNS05ZWNjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iozjNtgvzf1NKQQ1zXNs9VrsUMTYaYRFrRQCSTWy9GM=)

clean_body: Hi friend, In honor of Pride Month, I want to share a personal story with you about my fiancé Malcolm. It's a little long, but it's important that you know where the heart of our campaign is. = = People often ask what brought me from the sunny shores of California all the way to the rolling hills of Pennsylvania and the great city of Philadelphia. My answer, first of all, is a job. My second answer is love — being with Malcolm. I fell in love with Malcolm because I discovered that he was someone who not only works hard for his community but loves hard on them as well. Whether he's leading block clean-ups or traveling thousands of miles across the Commonwealth, listening to folks talk about their needs and their dreams, he shows his community love in public every day. Actions like these show us where love and democracy overlap — they show us that democracy is a public practice of love. As a working person, as a Black millennial, as a gay person, I see Malcolm as a prism of the love and light our country needs. And that I need. So as his fiancé, I'm so proud to stand with Malcolm as we fight for love and a democracy that works for working people like us. And I'm grateful to have you be a part of our fight. This campaign is powered by working people, unapologetically for working people. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks for reading, friend. Onward and upward, Dr. Matt * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. I’m writing to you from Israel, where I’m showing America’s support for our friend and ally.
When Israel was attacked by terrorists, President Biden refused to take a side while the Left abandoned Israel altogether.
It’s up to us to stand with Israel. It’s up to us to show the world the truth.
That’s why I’m meeting with families hurt by Hamas’ rockets and who live so close to the terrorists that want to kill them.
We have a duty to support our friend, and that will never change.

name: Secure the Senate (via When Democrats Turn Out)
subject: Val Demings will make the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, the Paycheck Fairness Act fell victim to the Senate filibuster this week and became the latest piece of our progressive agenda to be buried in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard. We are beyond frustrated that the GOP is still standing against equal pay for women. There is no excuse for Mitch McConnell's obstinate rejection of decency. And this is just further evidence that no progressive legislation \-- no matter how widely popular across both major political parties \-- will be able to clear the Senate with the filibuster intact. **The good news is that we have a plan for expanding our Senate majority and ending the filibuster once and for all so that we can pass progressive legislation like the Paycheck Fairness Act, and that plan hinges on Val Demings.** Demings was a co-sponsor for the Paycheck Fairness Act in the House, and she will continue to fight for a progressive future once she takes over Marco Rubio's Senate seat. But Mitch McConnell knows what a threat Demings is to the GOP's agenda. He is pleading with his corporate donors to funnel as much campaign cash as they can to defeat Demings and keep Marco Rubio in his vulnerable seat. | **[HELP DEMINGS DEFEAT RUBIO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30752013/290517669/-29553365?refcode=OUT_20210613_GEN_FDR_L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2Mzk3ZWEyLWE3Y2MtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=47uyYVlEPM_hb48I4BzcsLL4KR_zW-c7dXIDeRvOJUw=)**

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Will you chip in $5 before Tuesday’s deadline?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we’re emailing for $5.
Why? Because two new Republican candidates just announced they are running against Mark in 2022 — that’s three opponents total. This is bad news for Arizona, we need to keep Mark in the Senate.
So we need to add 10,000 contributions by Tuesday so we can stay on track to reach our goal of 100,000 contributions by the end of this month.
It’s people like you chipping in five dollars at a time in response to emails like this that will allow us to hit our goals and defend this seat so we can keep Mark in the Senate fighting for us.
**So before Tuesday’s deadline, we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign? Every donation we receive before will be put right to work in our efforts to hold Arizona’s seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?amount=5?refcode=em210613-2-15&t=1&refcode2=784_6688874_6rZLRM&akid=784%2E6688874%2E6rZLRM)

name: Lauren Lalonde, Pramila for Congress
subject: Important read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We're always building on this work in a massive way, and we won’t stop fighting for big, bold, transformative change.
#
Peter, I wanted to give you an update on how our fundraising for this quarter is going as we get ready for an important push. **[But before I dive into the details, can you chip in $3 to help us raise $10,000 by the end of the day on 6/16?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3418?refcode=em20210613-370&t=1&akid=370%2E420207%2ED6xhi9)**
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3418?refcode=em20210613-370&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=370%2E420207%2ED6xhi9)**
Throughout this quarter, Pramila has been laser-focused on fighting to end the filibuster, holding Republicans accountable for the deadly January 6 attack, passing historic voting rights protections, expanding and improving Medicare on the way to Medicare for All, taxing the ultra-wealthy, and much more.
From television interviews to get our message out and petitions that generate real momentum around our priorities, we're doing everything we can to expand our impact and our progress — because there's so much at stake. We're always building on this work in a massive way, and we won’t stop fighting for big, bold, transformative change.
But unfortunately, our fundraising hasn't followed suit with the volume of work we have planned. Usually, we'd be about 85% of the way to hitting our contribution goal for a quarter — but as of today, we're only 72% of the way to our goal. That’s just not where we need to be.
**_Given our rising organizing expenses and big fights on the horizon, we must meet our fundraising goal of $10,000 before 6/16._** As a grassroots, people-first campaign that doesn't take a cent of corporate PAC money, we fully rely on donations from people like you to power our progress.
[**Our average donation from emails like this last month was $22.83. Some folks give more, some folks give less, but all donations go directly to fueling our urgent fights for change. Will you chip in whatever you're able to and help us hit our $10,000 goal?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3418?refcode=em20210613-370&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=370%2E420207%2ED6xhi9)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/3418?refcode=em20210613-370&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=370%2E420207%2ED6xhi9)**
Thanks for helping us get on track and closer to meeting our urgent goal before time is up,
Lauren Lalonde
Finance Director
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210613-370-footer&t=23&refcode2=370_420207_D6xhi9&akid=370%2E420207%2ED6xhi9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=370%2E420207%2ED6xhi9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=370%2E420207%2ED6xhi9)

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: BLM Blinken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal)
body:
Stand for the Flag 🇺🇸

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=06f432ceb1dd40a4a18d34d5c9ee3b09&_e=VDh81kiUY4dpEVHqAmW967L4aaz5gmpybt6DqqlPSNLiQKU18aogikt2APgv0U43o3ikq-3GyfUQ1PxAOQ4a0TK3BMKlyWh-TbUue_0BKmvbKPzSjEJQVEMPbofP1TsVjUTNJ7fGpM6XRc31kslPoljX7-FtsYK2Ua-AnHl9Yc6caMlyXTumH14wuyB2D3NOMT8icTwanufdjMJNPaFHVYlzICldgqlIo0Hh6L-XNX44TnMJMaSpRadutrs31Vig7JtyUEgSIEoHWA2kWsnm4jSZxtJxBuxpe4PdcVFc_EiCYmvw9ns38NPd7WPA68MJZDCxGQet0IhF_Js8YPFEXJHw1jZ2h_PJFuBr9izPXbFaEhrKBthZpXJGo9LeyHg3ryac3B1bvn-JCX4jQcC3NDqFNulp3pxUpT-pKNevQhfWhr0IMhjwZ-b2lFHW6CPVVW0XIxRQ1pjKHb_KbzzDH0R5nnzddMKbKipz5mRNEvp9fXF5fI3AHWUDh548IQfP)
---
Friend,

**“Trained Marxists” who want to “Dismantle the Nuclear Family.”**

No, I’m not talking about China, I’m talking about BLM and the Biden Administration has just authorized American embassies to **FLY THEIR FLAG**.

I want to make this clear: **THE ONLY FLAG THAT SHOULD FLY AT OUR EMBASSIES IS THE AMERICAN FLAG 🇺🇸**
| [**STAND FOR THE FLAG🇺🇸**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=06f432ceb1dd40a4a18d34d5c9ee3b09&_e=VDh81kiUY4dpEVHqAmW967L4aaz5gmpybt6DqqlPSNLiQKU18aogikt2APgv0U43o3ikq-3GyfUQ1PxAOQ4a0TK3BMKlyWh-TbUue_0BKmvbKPzSjEJQVEMPbofP1TsVjUTNJ7fGpM6XRc31kslPoljX7-FtsYK2Ua-AnHl9Yc6caMlyXTumH14wuyB2D3NOMT8icTwanufdjMJNPaFHVYlzICldgqlIo0Hh6L-XNX44TnMJMaSpRadutrs31Vig7JtyUEgSIEoHWA2kWsnm4jSZxtJxBuxpe4PdcVFc_EglnI0f_mYCUx43nSEbUxx1cNTawBS2C6kG0rxerRns3Z76lAcZ54bEo7OaAgQCNubSV1ppIcTkcn-D1zrYMdKNNqVNfM19lzEM7HjvOXSMpmC_4wtUikUdyxn1zpIb32ufslqeRCyvuoTuQoTJwoJdssgVbv9t58EGKbNCLumIMuLX06_go8-2JUf5BSs41uLtic8xviK_V1FVKjokfuig)
---

Secretary of State Anthony Blinken thinks flying the BLM flag is about “putting our best foot forward.” I DISAGREE! I think **we can best express our values by flying our AMERICAN FLAG proudly for all to see!**

As the daughter of 2 immigrants, I am proud to be an American. I won’t stand for a flag that represents a **MARXIST** organization that silences opposition, burns down US cities, causes 2 BILLION dollars in damage, and funnels money to the Democrats!
[**REJECT MARXISM**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=06f432ceb1dd40a4a18d34d5c9ee3b09&_e=VDh81kiUY4dpEVHqAmW967L4aaz5gmpybt6DqqlPSNLiQKU18aogikt2APgv0U43o3ikq-3GyfUQ1PxAOQ4a0TK3BMKlyWh-TbUue_0BKmvbKPzSjEJQVEMPbofP1TsVjUTNJ7fGpM6XRc31kslPoljX7-FtsYK2Ua-AnHl9Yc6caMlyXTumH14wuyB2D3NOMT8icTwanufdjMJNPaFHVYlzICldgqlIo0Hh6L-XNX44TnMJMaSpRadutrs31Vig7JtyUEgSIEoHWA2kWsnm4jSZxtJxBuxpe4PdcVFc_Eiv-58zp8j16c-dX1FpNI6Uh_iT9c_3QNqE-ccBNOIo5DbbVNRBscOxjVeKm3jwVy_P5Giedsrw6KIOtMNPKtxopxiI3HVN6SNQGttTnRwGfBpcPGtYdIJQPqIwYzCX4hoaIfUjvUI9aTXk6doEKSZ2WWgttdy9embgQ-1yiI_Vu1hc9zY-7axWsgb7YS_3GX5ftYQHtIfZQsXsXfPb8Ld6)
---

**[This might be our last chance to protect the American flag. Please join me.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=06f432ceb1dd40a4a18d34d5c9ee3b09&_e=VDh81kiUY4dpEVHqAmW967L4aaz5gmpybt6DqqlPSNLiQKU18aogikt2APgv0U43o3ikq-3GyfUQ1PxAOQ4a0TK3BMKlyWh-TbUue_0BKmvbKPzSjEJQVEMPbofP1TsVjUTNJ7fGpM6XRc31kslPoljX7-FtsYK2Ua-AnHl9Yc6caMlyXTumH14wuyB2D3NOMT8icTwanufdjMJNPaFHVYlzICldgqlIo0Hh6L-XNX44TnMJMaSpRadutrs31Vig7JtyUEgSIEoHWA2kWsnm4jSZxtJxBuxpe4PdcVFc_Ejy9gOQ14Xt_daUmnk-_5DXCB6N9A0K0s9TiW5v4jWVb3uYtXnQGKgND-yWDP4h5ZyPvTUm6mmqA7Fr_oa0LJjdW7gOd3dzDI4xvvKjugffZoX5nJj_ddSuLLsZ2iKt93YmInKCYI3lRHmBlYnnQPJg9XB1eBuxnICnB3oxhd-VsQOTy8-QMeCag904S773-5tne11zY_YjYYTCGETdzDaQ) **

Thank you,

Rep. Nicole Malliotakis

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Never Again Protest MONDAY
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_powers_tomorrow&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka is standing in the way of passing the most important legislation of our time: the[Never Again Bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_powers_tomorrow&n=2)! ** After 457 days of one man's Unilateral Declaration of Emergency Powers, every sane individual should be demanding that Walz' Emergency Powers end for good. And the only way to ensure that happens is by passing Rep Erik Mortensen's **Never Again Bill**. There are a lot of fake End Powers bills out there, and I'd imagine you'll see some more fakers create their own bills again this week. But **Mort's Never Again Bill** is the only one that removes Walz from unilaterally declaring an emergency and ensures that an emergency can only be declared by a 2/3 majority of the legislature. **A 2/3 Majority is critically important because it protects us even when Democrats are in complete control of state government!** To show support for **Mort's Never Again Bill** , and to put pressure on weak Senate Republicans, Michele Even, a true patriotic activist, has put together an excellent Never Again Protest tomorrow, Monday, June 14th in front of the Senate Office Building. **Michele wants our voice to be heard by every Senator, especially Weakling Gazelka, so they know there's a price to pay for selling out on Minnesota. For the first time in 15 months, the Senate Office building will be open to the public.** Join Michele, myself and Rep Erik Mortensen as the fence around the Capitol is torn down and the public is allowed back in. Make YOUR voice heard about how the **Never Again Bill** needs to pass before Gazelka agrees to a budget deal with Democrats.
## Where: [Senate Office Building](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=YDzITEgJp2pH9y7Nkh1bRC9z6FacUWfYroTV2oAsDbsPUHcnjrK8CXyqTzPsPK00jle28puzhauWTxnUwqEfGDofCDF80j0DZvK8yPVoRivy9l5yx6eVdwQ9GZM_n5JV&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_powers_tomorrow&n=3)
## When: Monday, June 14th at 10:30 am
More information [here](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOWE88O_KNkEW0Dhjnqt7jwa&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_powers_tomorrow&n=4). Listen Peter, politics is won by those who show up. Radical leftists protest at the Capitol and often control the political landscape. We need every politician up there to see the power of our movement. And you can help. Please come join us on June 14th at 10:30 am at the Senate Office Building. Look for the crowd waving "Never Again" signs around. You'll know you're in the company of fellow patriots! **Can't make it? Help us pay for the signs, cowbells and horns by donating today.[Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to help us make a loud voice on Monday!](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_powers_tomorrow&n=5)** This is the time when legislators start to compromise and give in to the radical left. Stop that from happening by showing up tomorrow! **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_powers_tomorrow&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_powers_tomorrow&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_powers_tomorrow&n=8), software for leaders.
